query:
ALTER TABLE `kols`
  ADD COLUMN `avgViews` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `totalCampaignPosts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN `totalKolPosts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

CREATE TABLE `saved_searches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `saved_searches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `kols`
  ADD COLUMN `avgViews` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `totalCampaignPosts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN `totalKolPosts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

CREATE TABLE `saved_searches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
